prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-LPWG-BUN-3PK-ONE-BL Product Type: PROTECTIVE_GLOVE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 3pk Universal Tool Work Gloves Adult Outdoor Home Gardening Heavy Duty Accessory Description: Protect your hands while working in your garden with the 3pk of Universal Tool Work Gloves. Everyone should have a pair of durable work gloves for gardening, yard work, crafts, home repairs and other general maintenance work.

The Universal Tool Work Gloves feature thick leather palms to help prevent blisters and protect against splinters, cuts, scrapes, and poisonous plants.

The rest of the glove is made of tough, breathable material that ensures comfort regardless of weather conditions. Search Terms: gardening working hand protection gloves Features: - 3pk Protective Leather Palms - Tough Breathable Material - Perfect for Gardening, Yard Work, Crafts, Repairs - Perfect for Gardening, Yard Work, Crafts, & Repairs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 3-pk Work Gloves Adult Gardening

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 3-Pk Adult Blue Work Gloves

anthropic.title_differentiation: Leather Palms, Breathable Material, Yard Work, Gardening, Crafts, Home Repairs, Heavy Duty Protection

openai.title_differentiation: 3 Pack, Protective Leather Palms, Breathable Material, Blister Protection, Gardening, Yard Work, Crafts, Repairs
